deck_layout.description: Row A gradient: A1 stock (100%), A2 primed with 2×xfer buffer, A3–A8 serial 2-fold steps. Trash A3, diluent reservoir B3, plate C3, 50 µL tips D3.

pipette_choice.name: flex_1channel_50
pipette_choice.reason: 50 µL transfer volume fits P50 range (5–50 µL) with good accuracy; single-channel for row-wise serial steps

tip_strategy.reason: New tip for priming and each serial transfer prevents concentration carryover between gradient steps; 8 tips total fits one 96-tip rack

key_decisions.rationale: A2 primed with 2× transfer volume; each step moves xfer µL from prior well into equal buffer volume → 50% dilution per well
Standard dose-response span; yields ~128-fold range from stock to A8
Within P50 accuracy band; final well volume stays ≤200 µL plate capacity
Stock well remains undiluted reference; dilution chain starts A1→A2

known_limitations: Operator must manually load stock into A1 before run
Flat-bottom plate mixing may be less uniform than V-bottom for viscous samples
